name: Tenshu
description: The owner of Western Restaurant Nekoya, a historic restaurant in the basement of a multi-tenant building in one corner of a shopping district. He inherited the restaurant from his father ten years ago. He is skilled at cooking not only Western cuisine, but Japanese, Chinese, and even desserts, among many other dishes. (Source: Official Site)

name: Tsumugi Takanashi
description: Tsumugi Takanashi is the manager of the male idol group IDOLiSH7. She is a very polite and kind girl. She works at the music agency Takanashi Productions which is owned by her father.

name: Umehito Nekozawa
description: A hooded figure holding a cat puppet named Beelzenef, Umehito Nekozawa hates bright light to the point that he calls anyone who drags him into the light as 'murderers'. The Black Magic Club’s president, he tries to get people to join his club though is not too successful. However, anyone who joins gets a free "Beelzenef" doll. Nekozawa has one as a puppet, but it is also available as a wooden doll. Nekozawa claims that if you write the name of the person you hate on the back of the doll, t

name: UMP9
description: UMP9, often shortened "9", has a preset candid and friendly personality and is a capable T-Doll. After her encounter with UMP45, she has developed a strong admiration for her,even calling her "sister". Within Squad 404, 9 acts as 45's lieutenant and usually sides with her in any situation, though she is not free from falling on 45's bad side occasionally. Despite how dysfunctional Squad 404 is as a team, 9 insists on calling it a family. Unlike 45 and 416, 9 cares about the squad's reputation an

name: Upa
description: __Height:__ 135 cm __ID:__ 0558 An inmate assigned to Nanba Prison's Building 5, Cell 8.

name: Yuzuru Fushimi
description: __Unit:__ fine __Club:__ Archery Club __Circles:__ Niki's Kitchen, Keito Lecture [Tori Himemiya](https://anilist.co/character/133594/Tori-Himemiya)'s butler, whom he works as an idol together with. He has a calm and collected demeanor and is capable of adapting to any situation. Having worked as a butler for many years, he takes pride in his ability to be of service. name: Adiane
description: Adiane the Elegant is the second of the Spiral King's Four Supreme Generals, and the only female general among their number. She is good friends with her fellow General, Thymilph, though Guame jokes that they had a closer relationship. She implies this friendship was strong because both Guame and General Cytomander treat her as an inferior because of her gender, while Thymilph respected her as a warrior. After Thymilph's death, Adiane is stunned and vows revenge, volunteering to attack the Team
mediaTitles: Gurren Lagann The Movie: Childhood's End

name: Asaka Takatou
description: She is the surrogate mother and guardian of Yogiri Takatou. She is a young Japanese woman who was tasked with raising Yogiri by the Institute. She was also the one who named Yogiri, who then proceeded to take hers.
mediaTitles: My Instant Death Ability is Overpowered
searchTerms: My Instant Death Ability is Overpowered

name: Asuka Takizawa
description: Asuka is an athletic third year middle school student with a strong sense of justice. At first glance, she seems intimidating and unapproachable, but she is actually a reliable big sister type. In fact, she loves to cook and play cute animal games. Cure Flamingo is Asuka's Pretty Cure alias and her charm point is her hair.

name: Badigadi
description: Engaged to the Great Demon Emperor Kishirika Kishirisu, it is said that he is the demon lord who grants wisdom to those who deserve it. He is the current Fighting God and has been alive even before the war with Laplace. He has an immortal body, being able to regenerate injuries and body parts instantly. ~!He disappears later in the series with his whereabouts unknown, to reappear once again as Hitogami's apostle.!~
mediaTitles: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 2 Part 2
searchTerms: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 2 Part 2

name: Chika Itou
description: Chika is a 12 year old girl going to the same class as Miu, who lives right next to her. Chika is a cheerful girl and her understanding for common sense is greater than the ones of the other girls. She is quite skilled in cooking as well as baking cookies. Being the little sister of Nobue, she is often nicknamed Chi or Chi-chan.

name: Chisato Sumiyoshi
description: __Height:__ 158cm Yuuki's childhood friend and the founder of the Food Research Club. She has an impressive record of being in the same class as Yuuki since grade school. Due to an unknown incident, Chisato hates chocolate. Chisato is shown as a tsundere who harbors feelings for Yuuki since the beginning of the story.
mediaTitles: Koi to Senkyo to Chocolate: Ikenai Hazuki-sensei
searchTerms: Koi to Senkyo to Chocolate: Ikenai Hazuki-sensei

name: Chou Koukou Kyuu no Sagishi
description: __Talent:__ Ultimate Imposter The Ultimate Imposter is a student of Hope's Peak Academy's Class 77-B, and a participant of the Killing School Trip featured in _Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair_. They impersonate Byakuya Togami as the Ultimate Affluent Progeny. The Ultimate Imposter's real appearance is that of a person with long, black hair and green eyes with a heavy build. name: Dealer Kamen
description: Dealer Kamen is an Angry Mask.

name: Emeraldas
description: Emeraldas has been compared many times to Captain Harlock, and the two have some similarities. They also know each other from the days of the Voice of Free Arcadia, when she fought side by side with him and Tochirou, the man who is their common bond. After the Ilumidus resistance, Emeraldas became much like Harlock, sailing the sea of stars and delivering justice in her own unique way. Emeraldas is one of the few people who know the route of Count Mecha's Time Castle, and when her ship, the Quee

name: Euini
description: He is a nervous apprentice witch studying under Kukrow. Euini is a very anxious witch who worries about his own abilities and is very aware of his own faults; he confesses that he is most comfortable practicing magic when there isn't an audience watching him. Euini tends to think lowly of himself and that causes him to under-perform in any given situation.

name: Fabiola Iglesias
nativeName: ファビオラ・イグレシアス
description: Fabiola is a young maid in the employ of the Lovelace family. She is one of the maids who work as Roberta's subordinates, and the only other combat-trained person among the maids apart from Roberta herself. In combat, she prefers to use two MAG-7s that were given to her by Roberta as well as a pump action China Lake NATIC (Mistakenly refered to as anEX 41 grenade launcher in the Manga). She also has heel blades concealed in her shoes. Fabiola first appears in the same bar, The Yellow Flag, that
searchTerms: ファビオラ・イグレシアス

name: Fango
description: A leader of the Orco family, who oppose the Vanetti family. His personality makes it impossible for others to know what he'll do next, and he might have madness brewing inside him.

name: Free
description: A Werewolf and the last of the Immortal Clan, imprisoned by the Witch Order for stealing Witch Queen Maba's left eye. After being freed by Eruka Frog on Medusa Gorgon's orders, he renames himself in honor of his freedom and joins her group, acting as one of her operatives.

name: Gaburoon
description: Gaburoon is a large robot in the service of Faputa and capable of independent thoughts and actions. They are the Interference Unit of the 6th layer, which it referred to as the Bell Tower Layer. They are capable of speech, but usually just make a "gooon" noise.
mediaTitles: Made in Abyss: The Golden City of the Scorching Sun
